creator: t-matubara@miracle.ocn.ne.jp
text:
While using editors/emacs(24.4), the following cannot use it by a compile
error.

Please correct.

editors/apel

===>  License GPLv2 accepted by the user
===>  Found saved configuration for apel-emacs24-10.8_10
===>   apel-emacs24-10.8_10 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by apel-emacs24-10.8_10 for building
===>  Extracting for apel-emacs24-10.8_10
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for apel-10.8.tar.gz.
===>  Patching for apel-emacs24-10.8_10
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for apel-emacs24-10.8_10
===>   apel-emacs24-10.8_10 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/emacs-24.4 - found
===>  Configuring for apel-emacs24-10.8_10
===>  Building for apel-emacs24-10.8_10
--- elc ---
/usr/local/bin/emacs-24.4 -batch -q -no-site-file -l APEL-MK -f compile-apel  /usr/ports/editors/apel/work/stage/usr/local /usr/ports/editors/apel/work/stage/usr/local/share/emacs/24.4/site-lisp /usr/ports/editors/apel/work/stage/usr/local/share/emacs/24.4/site-lisp
Loading /usr/ports/editors/apel/work/apel-10.8/APEL-CFG...
Eager macro-expansion failure: (wrong-type-argument sequencep 769)
Wrong type argument: sequencep, 769
*** [elc] Error code 255

make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/editors/apel/work/apel-10.8
1 error

make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/editors/apel/work/apel-10.8
===> Compilation failed unexpectedly.
Try to set MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes and rebuild before reporting the failure to
the maintainer.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/editors/apel

Best regards
